name: Suraj Singh
title: MES Software Engineer
summary: MES Software Engineer with strong expertise in C#, .NET Core, and PostgreSQL, specializing in real-time manufacturing systems and shop-floor integration. Experienced in developing reliable backend solutions for MES applications, enabling production tracking, material traceability, inventory management, and SAP integration. Hands-on experience with industrial communication technologies such as OPC UA, Kepware, and WebSockets.

highlights: Implemented end-to-end MES workflows for Raw Material Issue (RMI) & Raw Material Booking (RMB), ensuring accurate inventory deduction, SAP acknowledgement, and production traceability.
Designed business logic for Inventory Management & Production Tracking, enabling real-time production quantity tracking and material consumption reporting based on quality checks.
Worked on SAP-MES Integration using OData services, managing master data flow, transactional updates, and acknowledgment mechanisms between ERP and shop-floor systems.
Integrated PLC and equipment data into MES using OPC UA and Kepware, implementing WebSockets for real-time production data capture and monitoring.
Implemented NCMR (Non-Conforming Material Report) workflows for logging non-conforming materials, quantity segregation, rejection/rework decisions, and SAP sync.

projects.title: Raw Material Issue (RMI) & Raw Material Booking (RMB)
projects.description: Implemented end-to-end MES workflows for raw material issue and booking. Ensured accurate inventory deduction, SAP acknowledgement handling, and production traceability.

projects.title: Inventory Management & Production Tracking
projects.description: Designed logic for inventory updates based on production status and quality results. Enabled real-time production quantity tracking and material consumption reporting.

projects.title: SAP-MES Integration
projects.description: Worked on SAP integration scenarios using OData services. Handled master data flow, transactional updates, and acknowledgment mechanisms between SAP and MES.

projects.title: Shop-Floor Integration
projects.description: Integrated PLC and equipment data into MES using OPC UA and Kepware. Enabled real-time production data capture and monitoring via WebSockets.

projects.title: Non-Conforming Material Report (NCMR)
projects.description: Implemented NCMR workflows for logging non-conforming materials during production and quality checks. Handled quantity segregation, rejection, rework decisions, and corresponding inventory updates.

education.institution: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC)
